name: storage-and-compact-simplification
title: Session storage centralization & compact simplification
description: Fix session file layout (centralize under ~/.jai/projects/<workspaceId>/) and simplify compact mechanism by removing iterative summary and split-turn cut point, adding PTL fallback.

commits.title: refactor(compaction): drop iterative summary + drift detection
chore(compaction): ensure stripMedia only applies to summarize path
